3221320.name: Wildlings: Why is There a Zoo in Bazooka?
3221320.description:
Wildlings: Why is There a Zoo in Bazooka? is a punishing bazooka-platformer where you don’t jump — you explode. You’re an animal. Or several. You swap heads, swap bodies, and blast yourself through a single massive level full of pain.

You aim with the mouse. You fire with the mouse. And then you deal with the consequences.

Features:

Blast yourself with a bazooka to move. That’s it.

Mix and match heads and bodies of 3 animals. For no reason.

Climb, fall, bounce, scream. In that order.

Two modes:

  • Regular Mode (checkpoints, a lie)

  • Classic Mode (no checkpoints, pure rage)

A single handcrafted level full of traps, fans, bounce pads, and regret.

Original soundtrack that slaps while you suffer.

Mouse only. No buttons. Just vibes and recoil.

You’ll restart a lot.

You’ll scream a little.

You might even laugh.

And if you make it to the end... well, we won’t spoil what’s there.
3221320.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
